subjects.description: pink lotus flowers floating on a peaceful lake
subjects.appearance_details: soft pink petals, yellow centers, broad green lily pads, slender stems below water, and crisp reflections on the still surface
subjects.relationship: main floral subjects in the high-angle lake composition
subjects.location: foreground and midground across the calm lake surface
subjects.relative_size: small natural forms made prominent by close high-angle framing
subjects.orientation: open blossoms facing upward toward fading evening light
subjects.pose: floating and gently swaying on subtle water movement
subjects.action: drift slightly, ripple their reflections, and glow in faint golden afterlight
subjects.state_changes: petals catch warmer highlights; reflections ripple softly; lily pads shift with water movement
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: silky petals, waxy lily pads, smooth stems, and reflective water texture
subjects.facial_features: yellow centers and layered radial petals

subjects.description: peaceful lake surface at evening afterglow
subjects.appearance_details: smooth water, clear reflections, faint golden light, soft ripples, blurred distant banks, and dreamy background bokeh
subjects.relationship: serene environment supporting the lotus flowers and reflections
subjects.location: entire frame beneath the high-angle camera
subjects.relative_size: broad lake surface filling the composition
subjects.orientation: flat reflective plane viewed from above
subjects.pose: calm surface with delicate ripple motion
subjects.action: reflects lotus flowers and golden sky while subtle ripples pass outward

background_setting: A quiet lake at evening, seen from a high angle, with pink lotus flowers, green pads, clear reflections, faint golden afterglow, and a blurred dreamy shoreline background.

lighting.conditions: Soft evening afterglow with pale gold highlights on petals and water, low contrast shadows, and a gentle dreamy haze over the lake surface.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Soft evening afterglow with pale gold highlights on petals and water, low contrast shadows, and a gentle dreamy haze over the lake surface.

aesthetics.composition: Peaceful, delicate, romantic, reflective, and dreamlike, with pink lotus color standing out against muted water and soft golden light.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Peaceful, delicate, romantic, reflective, and dreamlike, with pink lotus color standing out against muted water and soft golden light.

cinematography.camera_motion: High-angle shot looking down at lotus flowers and reflections, slow floating camera movement, shallow depth of field toward the blurred background.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Dreamy cinematic lake realism with soft bokeh, gentle reflections, and restrained evening color.
context: Pink lotus flowers rest on a peaceful lake during evening afterglow, their reflections visible in the calm water and the background softly blurred.

actions.description: A high-angle view reveals pink lotus flowers and green pads floating on a calm reflective lake.
Faint golden afterglow spreads across the water as petals sway slightly and reflections ripple.
The camera drifts gently over the lotus cluster, holding the dreamy blurred background and clear lake reflections.

segments.description: Establish the high-angle lotus lake composition with clear reflections and soft evening color.
segments.key_changes: The lotus cluster becomes centered and the reflections settle into view.
segments.camera: High-angle floating shot, slow downward drift.

segments.description: Show the golden afterglow touching pink petals and calm water while small ripples move through reflections.
segments.key_changes: Water reflections shimmer, petals brighten, and background blur deepens.
segments.camera: Gentle lateral glide over the lake surface.

segments.description: Hold on the most charming lotus blossoms, with dreamy bokeh and peaceful lake texture.
segments.key_changes: Motion slows and the scene resolves into a calm reflective tableau.
segments.camera: Slow close high-angle hold with shallow depth of field.

temporal_caption: Pink lotus flowers float on a peaceful lake under soft evening afterglow, their reflections rippling in a dreamy high-angle view.
audio_description: Very soft water ripples, distant evening insects, light breeze over the lake, and a quiet dreamy ambience.
